title: osmanthus austrocaledonicus subsp. collinus
intro: Osmanthus austrocaledonicus subsp. collinus is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to Papua New Guinea. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus austrocaledonicus subsp. collinus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation due to its calming scent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to address various health concerns and promote overall well-being.
